message:
fix(rate_limit): avoid holding read guard across assertion in deadline saturation test

The test_enqueue_deadline_saturates_for_huge_timeouts test held a
RwLock read guard while asserting on the entry's deadline_millis. If
the assertion panicked, the guard would not be dropped cleanly, which
could poison the lock and cause cascading failures in concurrent test
runs.

Changed to extract deadline_millis into a local via .map() before
dropping the guard, then assert on the local value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
